auditmanager.assessment.scope.CfnAbout: The `Scope` property type specifies the wrapper that contains the AWS accounts and services that are in scope for the assessment.

auditmanager.assessment.scope.AwsAccount.Description: The AWS accounts that are included in the scope of the assessment.

auditmanager.assessment.scope.AwsService.Description: The AWS services that are included in the scope of the assessment.
